name: howbiscuit-site
description: How Biscuit publishing shell built with custom Astro components.

scripts.article:validate: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/article-cli.mjs validate
scripts.article:compile: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/article-cli.mjs compile
scripts.article:compile:check: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/article-cli.mjs compile --check
scripts.editorial:compile: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/editorial-cli.mjs compile
scripts.editorial:check: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/editorial-cli.mjs check
scripts.idea:score: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/editorial-cli.mjs score
scripts.product:validate: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/product-cli.mjs validate
scripts.product:compile: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/product-cli.mjs compile
scripts.product:check: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/publishing/product-cli.mjs check
scripts.offers:policy-check: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/offers/source-policy-cli.mjs check
scripts.providers:broker-doctor: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/providers/broker-contract.mjs doctor
scripts.providers:broker-validate: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/providers/broker-contract.mjs validate-response
scripts.data:check: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/data/compile.mjs --check && node scripts/data/cli.mjs validate
scripts.data:status: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/data/cli.mjs status
scripts.data:coverage: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/data/cli.mjs coverage
scripts.research:list-sources: npm run runtime:check && node scripts/data/cli.mjs list-sources
scripts.publishing:qa: npm run runtime:check && npm run product:check && node scripts/publishing/publishing-qa.mjs
scripts.typecheck:contracts: npm run runtime:check && tsc --pretty false -p src/config/tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: npm run runtime:check && npm run editorial:compile && npm run product:compile && npm run article:compile && npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run runtime:check && npm run data:check && npm run offers:policy-check && npm run editorial:check && npm run product:check && npm run fuel:eia-import -- --check && npm run article:compile:check && npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check && node scripts/build-static.mjs && npm run offers:worker-build
scripts.build:sites: npm run runtime:check && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-sites-build.mjs && node scripts/build-static.mjs --finalize-sites-package && node scripts/build-static.mjs --verify-sites-package
scripts.check: npm run runtime:check && npm run editorial:check && npm run product:check && npm run article:compile:check && npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check
scripts.test: npm run runtime:check && npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/*.test.mjs test/offers/*.test.mjs test/location/*.test.mjs test/integrations/*.test.mjs
scripts.qa: npm run runtime:check && npm run test && node scripts/lint-content.mjs
scripts.qa:pi:inner: npm run runtime:check && npm run editorial:check && npm run product:check && npm run offers:migration-check && npm run offers:policy-check && npm run offers:catalog-sync -- --check --commit HEAD && npm run fuel:eia-import -- --check && npm run article:compile:check && npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check && node scripts/build-static.mjs --pi-pagefind-skip && npm run offers:worker-build && node --test test/*.test.mjs test/offers/*.test.mjs test/location/*.test.mjs test/integrations/*.test.mjs && node scripts/lint-content.mjs
